text.content:
Every hero needs a little luck. Hero tokens, surges, and victories are the currencies of heroism—earned through courage, spent for glory.

Hero Tokens

Hero tokens are a group resource shared by all heroes. They represent those moments when fate favours the bold. Track them with poker chips, stones, or markers—everyone at the table can spend from the shared pool.

Earning Hero Tokens

  • At the start of each session, the party receives hero tokens equal to the number of heroes.
  • Heroes earn additional tokens by taking big risks to save others—leaping off a cliff to reach a friend, crossing a burning bridge to save a stray cat, or wagering a prized treasure to shelter refugees. The Director decides which acts qualify.
  • Tokens can also be earned as part of a test's reward outcome (success with a reward).

Spending Hero Tokens

You may use one hero token benefit per turn or per test.

Cost Effect
1 token Gain 2 surges (use them to boost damage or potency—see Surges below).
1 token Save succeed: When you fail a saving throw, succeed instead.
1 token Test reroll: Reroll a test. You must use the new result.
2 tokens Recovery: On your turn or when you take damage (no action required), regain Stamina equal to your recovery value before taking the damage.

Session Reset: Unless the Director decides otherwise, unused hero tokens disappear at the end of a session.

Surges

Surges represent moments of heightened focus and power during combat. A troubadour's battle song, a fury's building ferocity, a shadow's patient insight—many abilities grant heroes surges during a fight. Track them on your character sheet.

Spending Surges

Cost Effect
Up to 3 surges Extra damage: When you deal rolled damage, spend up to 3 surges. Each surge deals extra damage equal to your highest characteristic score to one target.
2 surges Potency boost: Increase potency by 1 for one target. You can't increase potency by more than 1 per target using surges, but you can spend additional surges to boost potency for multiple targets.

End of Combat: Any unspent surges are lost when combat ends. Use them or lose them!

Victories

Victories measure your hero's increasing power over the course of an adventure. You start each adventure at 0 Victories. The more battles you win, the stronger you become before you rest.

Earning Victories

Source Victories Earned
Surviving a combat encounter where objectives are achieved 1 Victory (more for especially challenging encounters)
Overcoming a major noncombat challenge (negotiation, montage test, puzzle, clever solution) 1 Victory (at Director's discretion)

Victories → Experience

When you finish a respite, your Victories are converted into Experience (XP):

  • You gain XP equal to your current Victories.
  • Your Victories then reset to 0.

In other words: fight hard, rest, level up. The cycle of heroism.

Recoveries

Recoveries represent how many times your hero can catch their breath and keep fighting. When you spend a recovery, you regain Stamina equal to your recovery value (one-third of your Stamina maximum, rounded down).

How to Spend Recoveries

  • In combat: Use the Catch Breath manoeuvre, or benefit from ally abilities (conduits, tacticians, troubadours).
  • Outside combat: You can spend recoveries freely when not in a dangerous situation.
  • Via hero tokens: Spend 2 hero tokens to use a recovery on your turn or when you take damage (no action required).

Running Out: When you have no recoveries left, your hero has reached their uttermost limit. Push forward carefully—or find a respite.

Quick Reference

Resource Scope Resets
Hero Tokens Shared party pool Refreshed to party size at start of each session
Surges Individual hero Lost at end of combat
Victories Individual hero Converted to XP at respite, then reset to 0
Recoveries Individual hero Restored at respite
